title: eragrostis bicolor
intro: Eragrostis bicolor, also known as blue grama grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the Great Plains region of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Eragrostis bicolor include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water, and it can also be used as a poultice to apply directly to the skin.
